stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 697 Figure 4.5.3.2 for Pressure Altitude 35 000 ft.
What will be the approximate change in ground distance available from 1000 kg of fuel for the following situation if the headwind increases from 25 kt to 35 kt?

Aircraft mass at start of cruise leg: 65 000 kg
Cruise level: FL350
Cruise speed: Mach 0.74
Forecast OAT at FL350: -65°C
Headwind at FL350: 25 kt
